replay_contract: Include requested session events by sequence ASC
Persist model.provider_request before provider stream open; include in replay manifest
Replay order timestamp ASC + id ASC
Include session-scoped invocation records in append order plus invocation ID
Include session-scoped stream rows by cursor ASC
Replay order queue ASC + created_at ASC + receipt_id ASC
Include resource refs/hashes from replay-critical records
Resolve JSON payload refs before canonical hashing
Allow-list approved owners; replay-critical constructors use explicit identities
Allow durations/health only outside replay hashes
Deterministic constructors for replay-critical tests/import paths
Allow security tokens and contention jitter only
Sorted-object canonical JSON for section and overall hashes
Delegate to session replay builder for current session without trace mutation
Focused static and behavioral DRC gates
UI/diagnostic ORDER BY timestamp paths are allowed; replay paths must use stable tie-breakers
